title: Mass Property
description: This sets or returns the value for the robot hand and workpiece/payload.
notes:
Sets or returns the value of the overall weight of the robot hand and workpiece/payload at the leading end side from the force sensor (not including the force sensor).

Mass Property Object is used to compensate for the effects of gravity on the force function.
see_also:
Applies To

Force Trigger

Operator Property
examples:
Function GetPeakForces MPSet MP1.GravityCenter, 10, 10, 100 MPSet MP1.Mass, 2 MP 1 Move CurPos +TLW(10) FC1 ROT
Fend
